title: Update Metrics API and POST Body to Include Description and Logic Fields
description:
Following MBT-555 which added `description` and `logic` fields to the metrics data model, update the Metrics API response and POST body to include these new fields.

### API Payload Structure
The metrics POST body sends an array of metric objects, each containing: `name`, `definition`, `dimensionality`, `description` (new), `logic` (new), `aliases`, and `categories` (taxonomy groupings). An `analyze` array contains dashboard/report component data with aggregation details.

The updated payload is consumed by the Metrics AI API service.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics API response includes description and logic fields
POST body to Metrics AI API includes description and logic for each metric
Existing metrics without description/logic send null values
middleware_changes: Updated metrics data serialization to include description and logic fields in the API payload.
api_changes: Metrics API POST body now includes `description` and `logic` fields per metric object. Metrics AI API service needs to be updated to accept the new JSON structure.
implementation_notes: Payload includes both metrics array (with taxonomy categories) and analyze array (with dashboard component aggregation data). Backend service update by Anton and Raj is needed to accept the new JSON format.
comment_summary: Developer shared the updated JSON payload structure showing the new description and logic fields alongside existing metric data and dashboard analysis data. Reporter confirmed and marked complete, noting a backlog item for the service team to implement acceptance of the new payload.
